My Academics

Manage your courses, plan your degree, and track your academic progress.

My Finances

View tuition, manage financial aid, set up payment plans, and access billing statements.

  • Tuition & Fees
  • Financial Aid
  • Payment Plans
  • Billing Statement
Forms & Documents

Access academic forms, financial documents, and important student resources.

  • Academic Forms
  • Financial Forms
  • Official Documents
  • Student Handbook
Career Services

Explore career opportunities, build your resume, and connect with career counselors.

  • Job Search
  • Resume Builder
  • Career Counseling
  • Career Events
Student Life

Get involved with student organizations, campus events, and wellness resources.

  • Student Organizations
  • Campus Events
  • Wellness Resources
  • Campus Resources
Alumni

Stay connected with your alumni network and access exclusive benefits and events.

  • Alumni Network
  • Alumni Events

  • Get Involved
Help & Resources

Find answers to common questions and get technical support when you need it.

APU eCampus Style Guide

A comprehensive guide to all reusable design components in the eCampus system.

Last Updated: April 2026

Colors

Color palette defined in scss/components/_colors.scss

Utility Colors

Red
#E4193B
Green
#80c342
Orange
#F88A00
Yellow
#FDB933
Blue
#0096D6

Brand Colors - APU

APU Blue
#00ffff
APU Blue Alt
#B3F5F5
APU Blue Active
#00CCCC
APU Green
#00ff00
APU Green Alt
#B2FFB2
APU Yellow
#ffff00
APU Yellow Alt
#ffffb2

Grayscale

Black
#000000
Gray Dark
#424242
Gray 60
#6b6b6b
Gray 20
#e5e5e5
Gray 10
#f5f5f5
White
#ffffff

Utility Classes

Red text (.red)

Green text (.green)

Orange text (.orange)

Blue text (.blue)

Gray dark text (.gray-dk)

<p class="red">Red text</p> <p class="apu-blue">APU Blue text</p>

Typography

Heading styles defined in scss/components/_headings-apu.scss

Headings

Heading 1 - Main Page Title

Heading 2 - Section Title

Heading 3 - Subsection Title

Heading 4 - Component Title

Text Utilities

Small Title (.small-title)

Lead paragraph with larger text (.lead)

Base text size (.text-base)

Small text size (.text-sm)

Large text size (.text-lg)

<h3 class="small-title">Small Title</h3> <p class="lead">Lead paragraph</p> <p class="text-sm">Small text</p>

Buttons

Button styles defined in scss/components/_buttons-apu.scss

Primary Buttons

Secondary Buttons

Disabled Button

<button class="btn btn-secondary">Secondary Button</button>

Link Buttons

Arrow Link
View Document
<button class="btn btn-link">Link Button</button>

Forward and Back Buttons

<button class="btn btn-link">Link Button</button>

Button Sizes

<button class="btn btn-main btn-sm">Small</button> <button class="btn btn-main">Default</button> <button class="btn btn-main btn-lg">Large</button>

Icon Buttons

<button class="btn btn-main"> <i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i> Save </button>

Forms

Form styles defined in scss/components/_forms.scss

Text Inputs

<div class="mb-3"> <label for="input1" class="form-label">Text Input</label> <input type="text" class="form-control" id="input1"> </div>

Select Dropdowns

<select class="form-select"> <option selected>Choose an option</option> <option value="1">Option 1</option> </select>

Checkboxes & Radios

<div class="form-check"> <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" id="check1"> <label class="form-check-label" for="check1"> Checkbox option </label> </div>

Textarea

<textarea class="form-control" rows="3"></textarea>

Alerts

Alert styles defined in scss/components/_alerts.scss

Alert Types

Track Your Status:

Check your email regularly for updates. You can also contact our admissions office at 1-877-468-6268 or admissions@apus.edu for any questions.

Track Your Status:

Check your email regularly for updates. You can also contact our admissions office at 1-877-468-6268 or admissions@apus.edu for any questions.

Financial documents will be available once you have been accepted and complete the pre-enrollment process.

Dismissible Alerts

System Maintenance Notice

Our systems will be undergoing scheduled maintenance on Sunday, April 6th from 2:00 AM - 6:00 AM EST. Some services may be temporarily unavailable during this time.

ACTION REQUIRED BEFORE ENROLLMENT CAN BEGIN!

Request Official Transcripts

Request Transcripts

Modals

Modal styles defined in scss/components/_modal.scss

Modal Dialog

Modal Title

This is a modal dialog. It overlays the main content and requires user interaction.

Modal body content goes here.

<button data-bs-toggle="modal" data-bs-target="#modal">Launch Modal</button> <div class="modal fade" id="modal"> <div class="modal-dialog modal-dialog-centered"> <div class="modal-content"> <div class="modal-header"> <h3 class="modal-title">Modal Title</h3> <button class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="modal"></button> </div> <div class="modal-body">Content</div> <div class="modal-footer">Buttons</div> </div> </div> </div>

Tabs

Tab styles defined in scss/components/_tabs.scss

Tab Navigation

My To-do List Pending Completed

Required

ID Verification

Upload ID

Transfer Credit Evaluation

Begin Evaluation

Financial Aid Application

Start Application

Not Required - Additional Items

These items are not required for enrollment, but will be required before registering for classes.

Define Your Payment Type

Get Started

Application Review

Under Review

Transcript Processing

In Progress

Application Submitted

View Document

Student Rights and Responsibilities

View Document

Student Orientation

View Document

Badges

Badge styles defined in scss/components/_badges.scss

Status Badges

Required Pending Completed Disabled
<span class="badge badge-required">Required</span> <span class="badge badge-pending">Pending</span> <span class="badge badge-completed">Completed</span> <span class="badge badge-disabled">Disabled</span>

Description Badges

Elective Capstone Internship Core

Count Badges

Count badge styles defined in scss/components/_counts.scss

Notification Counts

Count badges are circular notification indicators:

  • 2
  • 4
  • 2
<div style="position: relative"> <i class="fa-solid fa-bell"></i> <span class="count">3</span> </div>

Standalone Counts

4 8 15
<span class="count-standalone messages">4</span>

Cards & Boxes

Card styles defined in scss/components/_cards.scss

White Box

White Box Component

Standard white box with padding, border radius, and shadow.

<div class="white-box"> <h3>Title</h3> <p>Content</p> </div>

White Box Variants

With Border (.white-box-border)

White box with visible border.

<div class="white-box-nopad">Content</div> <div class="white-box white-box-border">Content</div>

Black Background

Black Background Box

Used for high-contrast content sections.

<div class="black-bg"> <h4>Title</h4> <p>Content</p> </div>

Profile Badge

Computer Science Expected Graduation: May 2027
<span class="profile-badge"> Computer Science <i class="fa-solid fa-pencil"></i> </span>

Progress Indicators

Progress bar styles defined in scss/components/_progress-bar.scss and scss/components/_horizontal-progress-tracker.scss

Vertical Progress Bar

Your Journey Status

Pre-Enrollment
Pre-Enrollment
Applicability Evaluation
Document Verification
Admitted
Admissions
Onboarding
Enrollment
Alumni

Horizontal Chevron Progress

Step 1
Step 2
Step 3
Step 4
<div class="horizontal-progress-tracker"> <div class="progress-step-wrapper"> <div class="progress-step-label">Step 1</div> <div class="progress-step completed first"> <i class="fas fa-circle-check"></i> </div> </div> </div>

Navigation Components

Navigation styles defined in scss/components/_nav.scss, _nav-offcanvas.scss, and _nav-overlay.scss

Main Navigation Bar

The main navigation bar includes:

  • Logo and branding
  • Search functionality
  • Top navigation links
  • Application menu dropdown
  • User profile access
  • Notification counts

See the top of this page for a live example.

Overlay Navigation

Overlay navigation features:

  • Full-screen overlay menu
  • Animated slide-in from right
  • Notification badges
  • Search integration
  • User profile quick access

Click the menu icon in the top navigation to see it in action.

Chat Widget

Chat styles defined in scss/components/_chat.scss

Chat Components

The chat widget includes:

  • Sticky Button - Fixed position chat trigger button
  • Chat Window - Slide-up chat interface
  • Chat Header - Title and close button
  • Chat Body - Message display area with agent/user messages
  • Chat Footer - Input field and send button

Chat Button

Message Styles

Hello! How can I help you today?

I have a question about my enrollment.

<button class="chat-sticky-btn"> <i class="fa-solid fa-comment"></i> </button> <div class="chat-window"> <div class="chat-window-header">...</div> <div class="chat-window-body">...</div> <div class="chat-window-footer">...</div> </div>

Calendar Component

Calendar styles defined in scss/components/_calendar.scss

Calendar Features

The calendar component includes:

  • Full month view with navigation
  • Compact mini-calendar view
  • Event indicators on dates
  • Tabbed event lists (My Events / School Events)
  • Event detail cards with actions
  • Color-coded event types
  • Responsive layouts for mobile

Document Lists

Document list styles defined in scss/components/_document-lists.scss

Document Items

ID Verification

Upload ID

Application Review

Under Review

Application Submitted

View Document
Action Required Due: April 15, 2026

Submit Official Transcripts

Your application is pending official transcripts from all previously attended institutions. Please request these as soon as possible to avoid delays.

Important Notice Deadline: May 1, 2026

Financial Aid Application Deadline Approaching

The deadline to submit your FAFSA for the upcoming academic year is May 1, 2026. Complete your application soon to maximize your financial aid opportunities.

Resolved Resolved on: March 26, 2026

Application Submitted

Your application has been successfully submitted and is under review by the admissions committee.

HIST 501 - Historical Research Methods

3 Credit Hours

Core

HIST 502 - Historiography

3 Credit Hours

Elective

HIST 510 - American History Since 1865

3 Credit Hours

Internship

HIST 520 - European History: 1500-Present

3 Credit Hours

Capstone

Cart Component

Cart styles defined in scss/components/_utilities.scss, and _modal.scss

Registration "Shopping Cart" Modal

Cart modal includes:

  • Standard modal styles
  • "Start Registration" button if empty
  • If not empty, shows classes, totals and costs
  • If not empty, shows ability to continue registration and "Clear Cart"

See the top of this page for a live example.

Footer

Footer styles defined in scss/components/_footer.scss

  • Privacy Policy
  • Terms
  • Accreditation
  • Career Opportunities
  • Newsroom
  • Mission

Do Not Sell My Personal Information (CA residents only)

American Public University System (APUS) is accredited by the Higher Learning Commission (HLC) and is a wholly owned subsidiary of American Public Education, Inc. (APEI). Pursuant to a contractual arrangement, APEI provides certain services for the benefit of APUS, subject to APUS oversight and ultimate authority. Pursuant to a license, APEI may use APUS's trademarks and other intellectual property in its performance of those services. American Public University System, American Public University, and American Military University are not affiliated with American University or the U.S. Military.

© 2025 American Public University System. All rights reserved.
